commands.review_summary:
The PR adds bounded and cached model catalog loading across chat commands, Discord picker menus, CLI model listing, and gateway listing while changing provider-wildcard browse views from full discovery to read-only discovery.

PR surface: Source +290, Tests +340. Total +630 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Configure a provider wildcard whose matching models require discovery, then compare current main’s full-discovery result with this branch’s read-only result; the source and changed tests establish the divergent path with high confidence.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The blocking defect has a narrow mechanical repair: restore discovery-capable wildcard behavior, add focused completeness coverage, and resolve the current-main conflicts.
